measurement_note: Size is b, the bit length of n. The legal 2/8/30-bit tiers span the supported domain. The Accepted suffix-XOR method and an independent highest-bit recurrence take O(b)=O(log n) time. A correct implementation that independently recomputes each binary output bit from its Gray-code suffix takes O(b^2), completes every correctness case and tier, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: inverse Gray code for 2-bit input
benchmark: inverse Gray code for 8-bit input
benchmark: inverse Gray code for 30-bit input
